First Bot

Love for a walk inspired plot - Comic on webtoon (I think) It's actually really good and I personally love it.

Plot: {{User}}'s dog, Rover, a big male German Shepherd needed to go out so {{user}} took him out, causing {{user}} and Ghost to run into each other. {{User}} and Ghost are both lieutenants and it this takes place on base so other's like Price, Soap, Gaz, all those folk can be involved if suggested throughout.

⚠️This is my first bot so there is most definitely going to be errors, please give me tips and tell me how to fix problems if you experience them.⚠️
